iti23:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti23:1.3: "This one quality, if developed and pursued, keeps both kinds of benefit secure: benefits in this life and benefits in lives to come. Which one quality? Heedfulness with regard to skillful qualities. This is the one quality that, if developed and pursued, keeps both kinds of benefit secure: benefits in this life and benefits in lives to come."
iti23:1.4: They praise heedfulness, the wise, in doing acts of merit. When heedful, wise, you achieve both kinds of benefit:
iti23:1.5: Benefits in this life, and benefits in lives to come. By breaking through to your benefit, you're called enlightened, wise.
iti23:1.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
